历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13193 → 10890 → 18037 → 15799 → 16764, showing a fluctuating and declining trend overall. In 2023, it significantly dropped to 18037, then rebounded in 2024, with a baseline of about 16764 in 2025.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category plan was 47 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 62 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 71, an increase of about 14.5% compared to 2025, with a notable increase in enrollment quotas, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking around 50th in recent years, making it a nationally renowned normal university; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive (positive events such as an 81-year-old doctoral graduate); Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 89th, comprehensive popularity about 216,000), with no significant negative public opinion; no abnormal application records; Education A+, Political Science A-, Psychology A-, Chinese History A-, Marxist Theory A-, with 5 A- or above disciplines, highlighting strong normal school disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment includes popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Statistics, with Computer Science and Electronic Information/Communication being highly recommended; the number of provincial Physics Category examinees increased from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, with an estimated 138,000 in 2026, a decrease of about 6.6% from 2025; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, which is in the same Southwest-Central China region as Chongqing, with a relatively close geographical distance, giving it a regional preference advantage for cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16764, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 14.5% easing competition, popular majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information) highly recommended attracting high-scoring students, and a slight decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees, the expansion effect and the appeal of popular majors offset each other. The minimum ranking is expected to slightly decline to about 18304, with a range of 17804–18800.
